sources.evidence: The Living End's official website links the same verified Spotify, Apple Music, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube and merchandise destinations used in this edition.
This is the band's official website and current tour, music, video, merchandise and mailing-list hub.

sources.sourceType: official Apple Music artist profile linked by the artist website
sources.evidence: The official website links this Apple Music profile; it identifies the Melbourne band, formation year and catalogue through the 2025 album I Only Trust Rock n Roll.
The official artist website's Merch navigation links directly to this dedicated The Living End collection at Sound Merch.
Rolling Stone Australia published this September 2025 Chris Cheney interview about The Living End's I Only Trust Rock n Roll album.
BMG's official announcement embeds this exact YouTube URL and identifies it as The Living End - I Only Trust Rock n Roll (Official Music Video).
Apple Music identifies The Living End as a Melbourne rockabilly-influenced Australian punk power trio formed in 1994.
Apple Music lists the band's verified albums and songs, including the 2025 album I Only Trust Rock n Roll and earlier releases through the 1998 debut.
Wikimedia Commons identifies the photographed band as The Living End and licenses the image under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 1.0.
